label: Accepted Payment Method
comment: Code indicating a means of payment, for example, BANK_CHEQUE, CASH, etc.

label: Activity Ideas
comment: A link to ideas for using a product or engaging in other forms of entertainment, particularly with children.

label: Has Additional Location ID
comment: Location identifiers assigned and managed by government bodies, trade organisations, and other entities.

label: Has Additional Organization ID
comment: Party/organisation identifiers assigned and managed by government bodies, trade organisations, and other entities.

label: Additional Organization Identification Type Value
comment: The value associated with the Additional Organization Identification Type Value.

label: Has Additional Product Classification
comment: Relates to a set of additional product classification details

label: Additional Product Classification Code
comment: Code specifying the applied additional product classification scheme.

label: Additional Product Classification Code Description
comment: A description related to the additional product classification code value.

label: Additional Product Classification Value
comment: Code specifying an additional product classification other than the GS1 Global Product Classification. The applied classification scheme is specified as additional information together with the classification value.

label: Additional Product Description
comment: Additional variants necessary to communicate to the industry to help define the product. Multiple variants can be established for each GTIN for e.g. Style, Colour, and Fragrance .

label: Has Additive
comment: Relates to details about any additives that a product may contain.

label: Additive Level Of Containment
comment: Code indicating the level of presence of the additive.

label: Additive Name
comment: The name of any additive or genetic modification contained or not contained in the product .

label: Has Postal Address
comment: The postal address for an organization or place.

label: Address Country
comment: Code specifying the country (and country subdivision) for the address using ISO 3166-1.

label: Address Locality
comment: Text specifying the name of the locality, for example a city.

label: Province State Code
comment: Text specifying a province or state in abbreviated format for example NJ.

label: Address Suburb
comment: A suburb within a town or city.

label: Affiliated to
comment: Method for associating an organisation/party affiliated to the identified organisation e.g., when engaged in an agent relationship (insurance, shipping, etc).

label: Has After Hours Contact
comment: Links to after-hours contact information. For general contact details, gs1:contactPoint SHALL be used.

label: Alcoholic Beverage Sub-region
comment: A legally defined geographical region where the grapes for a wine were grown also known as an appellation. It is recommended to populate this property with an ISO 3166-2 code to indicate country and subdivision.

label: Allergen information
comment: A link to a description of the allergen information.

label: Allergen Level Of Containment
comment: Code specifying the level of presence of the allergen.

label: Allergen Specification Agency
comment: The agency or other organization that defines or manages the criteria for allergen containment.

label: Allergen Specification Name
comment: Free text field containing the name and version of the regulation or standard that defines the criteria of allergen containment.

label: Allergen Statement
comment: Textual description of the presence or absence of allergens as governed by local rules and regulations, specified as one string.

label: Allergen Type Code
comment: Code specifying the type of allergen.

label: Anatomical Form
comment: Describes the meat product in terms of whether it is the whole animal or part of the animal which has been cut such as the muscle, bone, organ, or fat.

label: App download
comment: A link to a related mobile app

label: Applicable Products
comment: The set of product identifiers for which this regulatory notification message applies.

label: Applicable to
comment: A property linking a gs1:linkType to the primary GS1 key(s) for which it can be used. Similar to rdfs:Domain but the value space is a GS1 Application Identifier, not a class.

label: Applicable Transactions
comment: References one or more business transactions

label: Has Audio File
comment: Link to a file containing an audio clip which is relevant to the product. Examples are commercials, or instructional/ how to use audio files.

label: Has Authenticity Details
comment: Links to details of covert/overt security markings that may be used to check authenticity of a product instance.

label: Authenticity Security Feature Instructions
comment: Provides human-readable instructions about how to locate a physical security marking and read a value from it.

label: Authenticity Security Feature Instructions Link
comment: Links to online instructions about how to locate a physical security marking and read a value from it.

label: Authenticity Security Feature Regular Expression
comment: Links to a regular expression to be used to perform syntax validation (plausibility checking) of a string value read from a physical security marking.

label: Authenticity Security Feature Type
comment: Links to a URI code value indicating a particular type of physical security marking.

label: Authenticity Security Feature Value
comment: Links to a string value read from a physical security marking.

label: Availability Ends
comment: The date from which the product is no longer available from the information provider, including seasonal or temporary product and services .

label: Availability Starts
comment: The date from which the product is available from the information provider, including seasonal or temporary product and services.

label: Available At/From
comment: The location the offered product or service is available from.

label: Available Language
comment: ISO 639-1 code specifying the language of a specified contact point.

label: Has Award Prize
comment: An award or prize given to the product.

label: Award Prize Code
comment: Indicates the achievement of the product in relation to a prize or award, e.g. winner, runner-up, shortlisted.

label: Award Prize Country Code
comment: An ISO standard code identifying the country in which a prize or award is given. It is recommended to populate this property with an ISO 3166-1 country code.

label: Award Prize Description
comment: Text that describes the awards won.

label: Award Prize Jury
comment: Free text listing members of the jury that awarded the prize.

label: Award Prize Name
comment: The name of a prize or award which the product has received.

label: Award Prize Year
comment: The year in which a prize or award was given.

label: Background Information
comment: A link to information typically from the owner of the identified entity about the creative background, thought leadership or influence of the identified entity. This may include the inspiration, innovation for a development process, literary approach or, the science or technology used.

label: Base Location
comment: A fixed physical location where a mobile location most commonly resides. If gs1:glnType is present, gs1:baseLocationGLN SHALL only be used when gs1:glnType is gs1:GLN_TypeCode-MOBILE_PHYSICAL_LOCATION

label: Best Before Date
comment: Best before date on the label or package signifies the end of the period under which the product will retain specific quality attributes or claims even though the product may continue to retain positive quality attributes after this date. Best before date is primarily used for consumer information and may be a regulatory requirement.

label: Beverage Vintage
comment: The year in which the majority of ingredients are harvested and/or the alcoholic beverage is produced. Determination as to whether the vintage year is the harvest date or production date is according to requirements in the Target Market.

label: Biotin Per Nutrient Basis Quantity
comment: Biotin Acid per specified nutrient basis quantity.

label: Boneless Claim
comment: The descriptive term that is used by the product manufacturer to identify whether the product makes a specific claim to contain no bones.

label: Has Brand
comment: The brand of the product that appears on the consumer package.

label: Information for professionals about this brand
comment: A link to a brand presence aimed at clinical professionals.

label: Information for patients about this brand
comment: A link to a brand presence aimed at patients.

label: Brand Name
comment: The brand name of the product that appears on the consumer package.

label: Has Brand Owner
comment: The brand owner of the product. The organization that is responsible for allocating the GTIN to the product.

label: Has Business Entity
comment: Method for noting business structure (e.g., Limited liability company, not for profit). Expects a repeatable value from gs1:BusinessEntityType code list.

label: Calcium Per Nutrient Basis Quantity
comment: Calcium per specified nutrient basis quantity.

label: Carbohydrates Per Nutrient Basis Quantity
comment: Carbohydrates per specified nutrient basis quantity.

label: Careers information
comment: A link to information about jobs, careers, or other employment opportunities associated to an organisation or location.

label: Catch Zone
comment: Free text field describing the sea zone from which the product was caught in.

label: Has Certification
comment: Certification information about a product, organisation or location.

label: Certification Agency
comment: Name of the organisation issuing the certification standard or other requirement being met .

label: Certification Agency URL
comment: URL of the organisation issuing the certification standard or other requirement being met. e.g. https://www.msc.org , https://www.fsc.org

label: Certification Audit Date
comment: Date of completion of the auditing needed for certification

label: Certification End Date
comment: Last date of validity for the certification. (After this date the certification lapses and would need to be renewed/replaced)

label: Certification Identification
comment: A reference (i.e, to a certificate instance) issued to confirm that a product, party or location has passed certification. e.g. 'XSC-C-12345'

label: Certification Information
comment: A link to certification information.

label: Certification Standard
comment: Name of the certification standard. Free text. Example: 'Egg classification' .

label: Certification Start Date
comment: First date of validity for the certification

label: Certification Statement
comment: Certification scope statement of the individual certification instance. The same certificationStandard can be issued with different values of certificationStatement in different instances.

label: Certification Status
comment: Indicates the current status of the certification, e.g. active or inactive.

label: Certification Subject
comment: References the object (e.g. product, asset, container), party or location being certified. If multiple values are specified, the certification details apply to the logical conjunction (AND) of groups of different types, while a logical disjunction (OR) applies within each group of the same type. For example, two sibling organisations O1 and O2 can process products P1 and P2 at locations L1 and L2: meaning that either organisation can process either product at either location (OR); but the certificate holds for the combinations of organisation (either O1 OR O2) AND product (either P1 OR P2) AND location (either L1 OR L2)

label: Certification Type
comment: Indicates the type of certification

label: Certification URI
comment: If gs1:certificationURI is present, it should point to data about this individual certificate within a repository maintained by the certification agency.

label: Certification Value
comment: The certification's standard value. Example: '4'.

label: Cheese Firmness
comment: The firmness of the cheese product for example EXTRA_HARD.

label: Cheese Maturation Period Description
comment: A descriptive way to specify a date range as some cheeses are matured over a period of time, but not an exact period. For example 3 to 4 weeks, over 1 year etc. The term maturation is also known in other markets as Aged.

label: Chloride Per Nutrient Basis Quantity
comment: Chloride per specified nutrient basis quantity.

label: Cholesterol Per Nutrient Basis Quantity
comment: Cholesterol per specified nutrient basis quantity.

label: Chromium Per Nutrient Basis Quantity
comment: Chromium per specified nutrient basis quantity.

label: Circle
comment: A circle is the circular region of a specified radius centred at a specified latitude and longitude. A circle is expressed as a pair followed by a radius in meters.

label: Clothing Cut
comment: Supplemental information to indicate the clothing cut or silhouette make of the garment. For example, silhouette details for a pair of jeans such as boot cut, or loose fit, comfort fit.

label: Collar Type
comment: A free text description of the type of collar on the garment.

label: Has Colour Code
comment: Relates to a set of details about the colour code for a product

label: Colour Code List
comment: The parties controlling the colour code lists. Dependent on colour code value.

label: Colour Code
comment: A code indicating the colour of an object according to a specific code list. The applied code list is specified as additional information together with the colour code.

label: Colour Description
comment: A description of the colour of an object.

label: Company Filing URL
comment: A URI value linking to information related to organisation filing details.

label: Compulsory Additional Information
comment: The legally required/compulsory additional label information as stated on the product packaging or label.

label: Compulsory Additional Label Information
comment: The legally required/compulsory additional label information as stated on the product packaging or label.

label: Compulsory Additional Label Information Type
comment: The code indicating the type of the legally required/compulsory additional information that is stated on the product packaging label.

label: Consumer First Availability Date Time
comment: The first date/time that the buyer is allowed to sell the product to consumers. Usually related to a specific geography. ISO 8601 date format CCYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.

label: Has Consumer Handling Storage
comment: Link to a website, file, or image containing the manufacturer's recommendations for how the consumer or end user should store and handle the product.

label: Consumer handling and storage information
comment: A link to information about safe handling and storage for consumer use.

label: Consumer Lifestage
comment: Indicates, with reference to the product branding, labelling or packaging, the descriptive term that is used by the product manufacturer to identify the period or stage in the consumer's life during which the product is considered to be suitable.

label: Consumer Package Disclaimer
comment: Additional information that should be used in advertising and in displaying.

label: Consumer Product Variant
comment: The consumer product variant may be used to distinguish one variant of a retail consumer trade item from another if the change does not require the allocation of a different Global Trade Item Number (per the GTIN Management Standard), but communication between trading partners is required to support consumers. The brand owner is responsible for assigning the consumer product variant.

label: Consumer Recycling Instructions
comment: Expresses in text the consumer recycling instructions which are normally held on the label or accompanying the product. Instructions may refer to the 'how' the consumer is supposed to sort the product and packaging materials for recycling.

label: Consumer Safety Information
comment: Information on consumer safety regarding the product.

label: Consumer Sales Condition Code
comment: A code indicating restrictions imposed on the product regarding how it can be sold to the consumer for example Prescription Required.

label: Consumer Storage Instructions
comment: Expresses in text the consumer storage instructions of a product which are normally held on the label or accompanying the product. This information may or may not be labelled on the pack.

label: Consumer Usage Instructions
comment: Free text containing the usage instructions of a product, which are normally held on the label or accompanying the product. This information may or may not be labelled on the pack.

label: Has Business Contact
comment: Contact information. To specify a contact specifically designated for after-hours support, see gs1:afterHoursContact

label: Has Contact Role Code
comment: The function or role of a contact. Value from gs1:ContactRoleType code list.

label: Contact Title
comment: The job title of the person that can be contacted for example Manager.

label: Contact Type
comment: The function or role of a contact for example Customer Support.

label: Contained in Place
comment: Designates the larger physical location a sub-location is located within. To specify sub-locations of a physical location, see gs1:containsPlace.

label: Contains Place
comment: Designates a sub-location (e.g., floor, room, shelf) within the physical location being identified. There may be multiple sub-locations associated to a single, physical location. To specify the larger physical location the sub-location is located within, see gs1:containedInPlace

label: Convenience Level Percent
comment: An indication of the ease of preparation for semi-prepared products. The convenience level indicates the level of preparation in percentage required to prepare and helps the consumer to assess how long it will take to prepare the meal.

label: Coordinate Reference System
comment: Open standard spatial reference systems or coordinate reference systems that provide coordinate-based local, regional or global system used to locate geographical entities. Values should be URIs already defined by the IOPG Geomatics Committee (https://epsg.org/), such as https://epsg.io/4326 (WGS84); https://epsg.io/4267 (NAD27); https://epsg.io/4230 (ED50); https://epsg.io/4618 (SAD69); https://epsg.io/4269 (NAD83). For elevation values, gs1:elevation SHALL be used.

label: Copper Per Nutrient Basis Quantity
comment: Copper per specified nutrient basis quantity.

label: Country Code
comment: Code specifying the country for the address using ISO 3166-1.; A short text string code (see values defined in ISO 3166) specifying the country in which a processing or other activity is performed, for example processing, bottling, manufacturing.

label: Has Country Of Assembly
comment: The place where product is assembled.

label: Has Country Of Last Processing
comment: The place where the product or ingredient was last processed and tested before importation.

label: Has Country Of Origin
comment: Code indicating the country of origin of the product.

label: Country Of Origin Statement
comment: A description of the geographic area the item may have originated from or has been processed.

label: Country Subdivision Code
comment: A short text string code (see values defined in ISO 3166_2) specifying the country subdivision in which an activity is performed, for example processing, bottling, manufacturing.

label: County Code
comment: A code that identifies a county. A county is a territorial division in some countries, forming the chief unit of local administration. In the US, a county is a political and administrative division of a state.

label: Cross Street
comment: A street intersecting a main street (usually at right angles) and continuing on both sides of it.

label: Corporate Social Responsibility Affiliation
comment: A URI value linking to information related to social responsibility activities and associations that an organisation/party is involved with.

label: Has Customer Support Centre
comment: The organization which provides product support to the trading partner organization to which merchandise is sold.

label: Daily Value Intake Percent
comment: The percentage of the recommended daily intake of a nutrient as recommended by authorities of the target market. Is expressed relative to the serving size and base daily value intake.

label: Default link
comment: The default link for a given identified item to which a resolver will redirect unless there is information in the request that is a better match.

label: Default linkMulti
comment: A set of 'default links' that may be differentiated by information in the HTTP request headers sent to a resolver to enable a better match than the single default link.

label: Department
comment: The name of a division of an organization dealing with a specific activity

label: Has Dependent Proprietary Product
comment: Dependent products are products which are required to make the current product functional.

label: Descriptive Size
comment: An alphanumeric size factor the brand owner wishes to communicate to the consumer. IE Jumbo, Capri, Full Length, Maxi.

label: Diet Code
comment: Links to multiple pairs of gs1:DietTypeCode and diet type sub code (free-form text string).

label: Diet Type Code
comment: Code indicating the diet the product is suitable for example Kosher.

label: Diet Type Description
comment: Free text for indication of diet not stated in the list of diets.

label: Diet Type Sub-code
comment: Indicates a set of agreements or a certificate name that guarantees the product is permitted in a particular diet. A diet type subcode is a subclassification of a specific diet type. For example, Pareve is a diet type subcode of Kosher.

label: Has Digital Address
comment: The location reference associated to a digital place. If gs1:glnType is present, SHALL only be associated if the value of gs1:glnType is gs1:GLN_TypeCode-DIGITAL_LOCATION.

label: Digital Location Name
comment: The name of a digital place. To specify the name of a physical location, see gs1:physicalLocationName.

label: Discount Repeats Per Multiple Minimum
comment: If specified and set to true, the discount is available for each time the minimum qualifying criteria are met. This can be used to express '$10 off each $50 spend', which is distinct from a 20% discount because it is quantized in units of spending.

label: Discount Type
comment: A code that specifies the type of payment discount applicable to an offer, for example BOGO.

label: Digital Product Passport
comment: A link to a digital product passport.

label: Drained Weight
comment: The weight of the product when drained of its liquid. For example 225 GRM, Jar of pickles in vinegar.

label: Due Date
comment: The date by which an invoice should be paid. This data element represents an attribute of a payment slip reference number, AI (8020), and a Global Location Number (GLN) of the invoicing party.

label: Duration Of Warranty
comment: The time period that the warranty is valid within.

label: Duty Fee Tax Amount
comment: The current tax or duty or fee amount applicable to the product, expressed as a floating-point numeric value that is qualified by the corresponding currency. See also gs1:priceCurrency.

label: Duty Fee Tax Description
comment: A description of tax type for example Taxes sure les supports audio.

label: Duty Fee Tax Rate
comment: The current tax or duty rate percentage applicable to the product.

label: Electronic Instructions For Use
comment: A link to electronic Instruction For Use instructions for Medical Devices.

label: Elevation
comment: The elevation of a location (WGS 84). Values may be of the form 'NUMBER UNITOFMEASUREMENT' (e.g., '1,000 m', '3,200 ft') while numbers alone SHALL be a value in meters.

label: Eligible Quantity
comment: The quantity including unit of measure for which the offer for good or service is valid. If this is not specified, an eligible quantity of 1 should be assumed.

label: Eligible Quantity Maximum
comment: The maximum quantity including unit of measure for which the offer for good or service is valid.

label: Eligible Quantity Minimum
comment: The minimum quantity including unit of measure for which the offer for good or service is valid.

label: Eligible Trade Channel
comment: A code determining the location where a user can redeem the offer, for example ONLINE_ONLY.

label: E-mail
comment: Creating/sending/receiving of unstructured free text messages or documents using computer network, a mini-computer or an attached modem and regular telephone line or other electronic transmission media.

label: Energy from Fat Per Nutrient Basis Quantity
comment: Energy from Fat per specified nutrient basis quantity.

label: Energy Per Nutrient Basis Quantity
comment: Energy Per specified nutrient basis quantity.

label: EPC Information Services (EPCIS) repository
comment: A link to an EPCIS repository of visibility event data.

label: Electronic Patient Information Leaflet
comment: A link to an electronic patient information leaflet.

label: Has Equivalent Product
comment: A product which can be substituted for the product based on supplier-defined functional equivalence to the product.

label: Events information
comment: A link to event details. For a page specifically for scheduling a reservation or booking an appointment, see gs1:scheduleTime.

label: Exact Discount Amount
comment: Links to a gs1:PriceSpecification that indicates in terms of an amount and specified currency, the exact discount on the sales price associated with a particular gs1:Discount. This property can be used to express '$10 off'.

label: Exact Discount Percentage
comment: A floating-point value indicating an exact percentage discount on the sales price associated with a particular gs1:Discount. This property can be used to express '15% discount'.

label: Exclusion Description
comment: A text description of any products, brands, or categories that cannot be used with the offer

label: Expiration Date
comment: The expiration date is the date that determines the limit of consumption or use of a product/coupon. Its meaning is determined based on the trade item context (e.g., for food, the date will indicate the possibility of a direct health risk resulting from use of the product after the date, for pharmaceutical products, it will indicate the possibility of an indirect health risk resulting from the ineffectiveness of the product after the date). It is often referred to as 'use by date' or 'maximum durability date'.

label: Expiration Date and Time
comment: The manufacturer determines the expiration date and time, which is relevant only for short duration and for items that will not be sent on long distances and not outside of the time zone. A typical application of AI (7003) is in hospitals or public pharmacies for special, customised, products which may have a 'life duration' shorter than one single day. The life duration varies according the pharmaceutical substances used in the treatment. The precise expiration date and time is defined at the end of the manufacturing process, and can be barcoded on the product label as an attribute to the item's GTIN. Where there is no business requirement to express the expiration date to the nearest hour (or less), AI (17) Expiration date should be used.

label: Frequently Asked Questions
comment: A link to a set of frequently asked questions.

label: Fat In Milk Content
comment: The percentage of fat contained in milk content of the product.

label: Fat In Dry Matter
comment: The amount of fat contained in the base product expressed in percentage.

label: Fat Per Nutrient Basis Quantity
comment: Fat per specified nutrient basis quantity.

label: Telefax
comment: A fax number used for transmitting and reproducing fixed graphic material over telephone lines or other electronic transmission media.

label: Fibre Per Nutrient Basis Quantity
comment: Fibre per specified nutrient basis quantity.

label: File Language Code
comment: The specified language to which the digital asset is targeted. It is recommended to use the ISO 639-1 language code.

label: File Pixel Height
comment: The number of pixels along the vertical axis of the image.

label: File Pixel Width
comment: The number of pixels along the horizontal axis of the image.

label: First Freeze Date
comment: The first freeze date is applicable to products that are frozen directly after slaughtering, harvesting, catching or after initial processing of the product. Examples include fresh meat, meat products or fishery products. The first freeze date is determined by the organisation conducting the freezing.

label: Fish Type
comment: The type of fish for example Sea bass.

label: Fluoride Per Nutrient Basis Quantity
comment: Fluoride per specified nutrient basis quantity.

label: Folic Acid Per Nutrient Basis Quantity
comment: Folic Acid per specified nutrient basis quantity.

label: Food Beverage Refrigeration Claim
comment: Identifies whether or not the product requires refrigeration.

label: Food Beverage Target Use
comment: The type of meal the food or beverage product is targeted to for example Breakfast.

label: Fastening Type
comment: Something that mechanically joins or affixes two or more parts together in a footwear product for example a shoe lace.

label: Footwear Upper Type
comment: The descriptive term that is used by the product manufacturer to identify whether the footwear upper is open or closed. Otherwise known as Open or Closed Upper.

label: Franchisee of
comment: Method for associating the franchisor organisation to the franchisee.

label: Franchisor of
comment: Method for associating franchisee organisation(s) to the franchisor.

label: Fresh or Seawater Farmed
comment: A code determining whether the fish originated from the sea or was farmed.

label: Functional Name
comment: Describes use of the product or service by the consumer. Should help clarify the product classification associated with the GTIN.

label: Genetically Modified Declaration Code
comment: A statement of the presence or absence of genetically modified protein or DNA.

label: Has Geocoordinates
comment: Links to information about geocoordinates or geoshapes for a place.

label: Has GLN Type
comment: Indicates what type of thing is being identified by a GLN.

label: Global Location Number (GLN)
comment: A Global Location Number (GLN) is the GS1 Identification Key used to identify physical locations or parties. The key comprises a GS1 Company Prefix, Location Reference and Check Digit. For more information see https://www.gs1.org/gln.

label: GPC Category Code
comment: 8-digit code (GPC Brick Value) specifying a product category according to the GS1 Global Product Classification (GPC) standard. For more information see https://www.gs1.org/gpc

label: GPC Category Description
comment: A description of the code specifying a product category according to the GS1 Global Product Classification (GPC) standard.

label: Gross area
comment: The overall area of the item including packaging. This can be given using a number of different AI ranges that depend on the units in which the area is measured.

label: Gross volume
comment: The overall volume of the item including packaging. This can be given using a number of different AI ranges that depend on the units in which the volume is measured.

label: Gross Weight
comment: Used to identify the gross weight of the product. The gross weight includes all packaging materials of the product. At pallet level the productGrossWeight includes the weight of the pallet itself. For example, 200 GRM, value - total pounds, total grams, etc.

label: Growing Method
comment: The process through which fresh produce is grown and cultivated.

label: GTIN
comment: A Global Trade Item Number (GTIN) is the 14 digit GS1 Identification Key used to identify products. The key comprises a GS1 Company Prefix followed by an Item Reference Number and a Check Digit. See https://www.gs1.org/gtin for more details.

label: Handled by
comment: Used when one resolver redirects all request URIs that match a given pattern without further processing, such as from GS1 to a brand-operated service. See section 7.7.1 of the Digital Link standard, version 1.1.

label: Harvest Date.
comment: The harvest date. For example, the harvest date can be the date when an animal was slaughtered or killed, a fish has been harvested, or a crop was harvested. This date is determined by the organisation conducting the harvesting. Different organisations may use more specific terminology when referring to their specific needs and use terms such as: Date of catch or slaughter date.

label: Harvest Date End
comment: The harvest end date. For example, the harvest end date can be the date when an animal was slaughtered or killed, a fish has been harvested, or a crop was harvested. This end date is determined by the organisation conducting the harvesting. Different organisations may use more specific terminology when referring to their specific needs and use terms such as: Date of catch or slaughter date. When referring to animals the date range refers to the whole animal and all meat or fish cuts derived from this animal.

label: Harvest Date Start
comment: The harvest start date. For example, the harvest start date can be the date when an animal was slaughtered or killed, a fish has been harvested, or a crop was harvested. This start date is determined by the organisation conducting the harvesting. Different organisations may use more specific terminology when referring to their specific needs and use terms such as: Date of catch or slaughter date. When referring to animals the date range refers to the whole animal and all meat or fish cuts derived from this animal.

label: Has Allergen
comment: Relates to details about allergens

label: Batch/Lot Identifier
comment: The batch or lot number associates an item with information the manufacturer considers relevant for traceability of the trade item to which the element string is applied. The data may refer to the trade item itself or to items contained. The number may be, for example, a production lot number, a shift number, a machine number, a time, or an internal production code. In cases where the same product is manufactured in different locations the brand owner and the manufacturer are responsible for ensuring the non-duplication of batch/lot numbers for a GTIN. For the re-use of batch/lot numbers with a GTIN, sector-specific constraints need to be considered.

label: Has primary location
comment: Links to the place(s) that this organisation designates as their primary location(s).

label: Has Retailers
comment: A link to a list of retailers.

label: Has Returnable Package Deposit Details
comment: links to details of amounts refunded for returnable package in a specified region.

label: Serial Number
comment: A serial number is assigned to an entity for its lifetime. When combined with a GTIN, a serial number uniquely identifies an individual item. The serial number field is alphanumeric and may include all characters contained in figure 7.11-1. The brand owner and the manufacturer are responsible for ensuring the non-duplication of serial numbers for a GTIN. For the re-use of serial numbers with a GTIN, sector-specific constraints need to be considered.

label: Third-Party Controlled Serial Number
comment: This identifier is assigned to an entity for its lifetime. When combined with a GTIN, a TPX uniquely identifies an individual item and forms a unit pack Unique Identifier (upUI) for tobacco traceability per EU 2018/574. The serial number field is alphanumeric and may include all characters contained in figure 7.11-1. The Third Party determines the TPX, but the TPX shall begin with the ID Issuer Unique Identification Code (UIC), followed by GS1 UIC Extension 1, and GS1 UIC Extension 2.

label: Health Claim
comment: A description of health claims according to regulations of the target market.

label: Organisation Information Page
comment: A link to general information about an organisation or brand. Typically the homepage of an organisation's website. It may include links to further information such as certifications, careers, payments, reservations, etc.

label: Has Product Image
comment: Link to a file containing a visual representation of the product.

label: Included Accessories
comment: Any included object or device not part of the core product itself but which adds to its functionality or use.

label: Has Food And Beverage Ingredient Information
comment: Links to information about ingredients of a specific Food/Beverage/Tobacco product.

label: Ingredient Content Percentage
comment: Quantity of the ingredient contained in the product as a percentage of the total product ingredients. This is used in conjunction with ingredientName.

label: Ingredient Name
comment: Free text field describing an ingredient or ingredient group. Ingredients include any additives (colourings, preservatives, e-numbers, etc.) that are encompassed.

label: Ingredient of Concern
comment: Indicates a claim to an ingredient, considered to be a concern for regulatory or other reasons, and which is 'contained' within the product but may not need to specify the amount whether approximate, or an accurate measurement be given.

label: Ingredient Sequence
comment: Integer (1, 2, 3...) indicating the ingredient order by content percentage of the product. (major ingredient = 1, second ingredient = 2) etc.

label: Ingredients information
comment: A link to facts about ingredients.

label: Ingredient Statement
comment: Information on the constituent ingredient make up of the product specified as one string.

label: Initial Certification Date
comment: The date when the certification was originally issued. May differ from the certificationStartDate of the current recertification cycle.

label: In Package Depth
comment: The depth of the product in its packaging, as measured according to the GS1 Package Measurement Rules. See https://www.gs1.org/package-measurement-rules-implementation-guide for more details.

label: In Package Diameter
comment: The measurement of the diameter of the product in its package at its largest point. For example, 165 MMT.

label: In Package Height
comment: The height of the product in the package, as measured according to the GS1 Package Measurement Rules. See https://www.gs1.org/package-measurement-rules-implementation-guide for more details.

label: In Package Width
comment: The width of the product in the package, as measured according to the GS1 Package Measurement Rules. See https://www.gs1.org/package-measurement-rules-implementation-guide for more details.

label: Instructions
comment: A link to instructions, such as assembly instructions, usage tips etc. It is not appropriate to use this link type for healthcare regulated content applications for which specific link types are available.

label: Has Instructions For Use
comment: Link to a file containing the Instructions For Use.

label: Iodine Per Nutrient Basis Quantity
comment: Iodine per specified nutrient basis quantity.

label: Iron Per Nutrient Basis Quantity
comment: Iron per specified nutrient basis quantity.

label: Irradiated Code
comment: Indicates if radiation has been applied to the product.

label: Is Carbonated
comment: Used to identify whether or not a beverage product is naturally effervescent or has been made effervescent by the addition of carbon dioxide gas.

label: Is Decaffeinated
comment: The descriptive term that is used by the product manufacturer to identify whether or not the product contains caffeine.

label: Is From Concentrate
comment: Used to identify whether or not the product claims to be made from a concentrated formulation.

label: Is Homogenised
comment: A The indication whether or not the milk used was actively homogenised. The homogenisation of milk is a technical process in the dairy. The milk fat is milled to such an extent that further creaming is prevented.

label: Is Instant
comment: Determines whether the product is instant.

label: Is Maternity
comment: Indicates, with reference to the product branding, labelling or packaging, the descriptive term that is used by the product manufacturer to identify if the product is intended as maternity wear.

label: Only Available Through Retailer
comment: If specified and set to true, the discount is only available through the retailer making the offer.

label: Only For Retailer Mailing List Members
comment: If specified and set to true, the discount is only available for customers who have signed up to the retailer's mailing list.

label: Only With Payment Card
comment: If specified, the discount is only available when purchasing using one of the specified payment card types.

label: Only For Retailer Loyalty Cardholders
comment: If specified and set to true, the discount is only available for holders of the retailer's own loyalty card.

label: Only For Retailer Payment Cardholders
comment: If specified and set to true, the discount is only available for holders of the retailer's own store payment card.

label: Is Patterned
comment: The descriptive term that is used by the product manufacturer to identify whether or not the product has a patterned design.

label: Is Pitted Stoned
comment: The descriptive term that is used by the product manufacturer to identify whether or not a fruit or vegetable product has been de-stoned or pitted prior to being offered for sale.

label: Is Product Recalled
comment: An indicator for the product to determine if the Manufacturer or Supplier has recalled the product.

label: Is Promoter Exclusive Offer
comment: Determines whether the offer is only provided by the promoter

label: Is Rind Edible
comment: An indicator whether or not the cheese rind is edible. Some cheeses are coated in plastic or their surface is treated with other traditional substances to increase their shelf life. This can result in the rind no longer being edible.

label: Is Seedless
comment: Determines whether the product is seedless as grown.

label: Is Shelled or Peeled
comment: The descriptive term that is used by the product manufacturer to identify whether or not the product or its contents have been shelled/peeled prior to being offered for sale.

label: Is Sliced
comment: Determines whether the product comes pre-sliced.

label: Is Thermal
comment: The descriptive term that is used to identify whether the product is thermal.

label: Is Vintage
comment: Identifies whether the product makes claim to being vintage.

label: Is Washed Ready To Eat
comment: Determines whether product has been prewashed and is ready to eat.

label: Is Waterproof
comment: The descriptive term that is used to identify whether or not the product claims to provide waterproofing to the applied surface.

label: Is Wearable Item Disposable
comment: Identifies whether or not the product is intended to be disposed of after single use or a limited period of use.

label: Item Offered
comment: The product included in the offer.

label: Juice Content Percent
comment: The fruit juice content of the product expressed as a percentage.

label: JSON Web Signature
comment: A link to a JSON Web Signature

label: Latitude
comment: Angular distance North or South from the earth's equator measured through 90 degrees.

label: Leased from
comment: Links to the organisation (lessor) from which this place is leased.

label: Leased to
comment: Links to the organisation(s) (lessee(s)) to which this place is leased. Property SHOULD be applied to a specific sub-location, rather than a main location, wherever possible.

label: Leave a review
comment: A link through which a review can be added.

label: Lessee of location
comment: Links to the place(s) for which this organisation is the lessee (i.e., this organisation leases those places from another organisation, the lessor).

label: Lessor for
comment: Links to the place(s) for which this organisation is the lessor (i.e., this organisation leases those places to others).

label: Line
comment: A line is a point-to-point path consisting of two or more point objects separated by a space. A single line segment (i.e., straight line) is expressed as two points. A multi-line path (i.e., open polygon) is expressed as a series of three or more points. For a closed shape, gs1:polygon SHALL be used.

label: Link Type
comment: Provides a URL for related information or services. This is not expected to be used directly but provides a super property for all other link types in the GS1 ecosystem.

label: Has Location
comment: The place(s) associated with an organization.

label: Location Description
comment: The description of a place.

label: Location Final Closure Date
comment: Date in which a location was finally closed. Note that this is NOT the date when a GLN was deactivated. To designate when location opened, see gs1:locationOpeningDate.

label: Location GLN
comment: 13-digit GLN that is being used to identify a physical or digital location. If gs1:glnType is present, gs1:locationGLN SHALL only be used when gs1:GLN_TypeCode includes FIXED_PHYSICAL_LOCATION, MOBILE_PHYSICAL_LOCATION, or DIGITAL_LOCATION

label: Has Location History
comment: Provides details on if and when a location is active or inactive.

label: Location ID
comment: Identifier value associated to a location. This value SHALL follow rules set forth by the administrating organisation designated in gs1:LocationID_Type.

label: Location ID Qualifier
comment: Secondary qualifier to supplement gs1:LocationID_Type meaning. May be used with proprietary ID code values to define identifier administrator.

label: Location ID
comment: Organisation that administers the gs1:locationID or the name of the ID itself. Value from gs1:LocationID_Type code list.

label: Location ID URI
comment: A URI that links to information about the gs1:locationID.

label: Location information
comment: A link to a map, directions, or other location-related information. For B2B location information, see gs1:logisticsInfo. For details specific to hours of operation, see gs1:openingHoursInfo

label: Location Opening Date
comment: Date in which a location was opened or otherwise established. Note that this is NOT the date when a GLN was allocated to identify the location. To designate when location was finally closed, see gs1: gs1:locationFinalClosureDate

label: Location Role
comment: A location classification based on the purpose, type of site and/or what occurs there. Repeatable value from gs1:LocationRoleType code list.

label: Location Status
comment: Designation of active/inactive status of a location.

label: Logistics information
comment: A link to B2B logistics information related to a physical location.

label: Longitude
comment: The arc or portion of the earth's equator intersected between the meridian of a given place and the prime meridian and expressed in degrees

label: Loyalty program
comment: A link to information about a loyalty program, including a member's current status and/or a registration option for new members

label: Magnesium Per Nutrient Basis Quantity
comment: Magnesium per specified nutrient basis quantity.

label: Makes Offer
comment: An offer made by an organization.

label: Managed by
comment: Links to the organisation that manages this place or organisation, as designated by the owner or another organisation.

label: Managed for
comment: Links to the organisation(s) for whom this place is managed. Property SHOULD be applied to a specific sub-location, rather than a main location, wherever possible.

label: Manages
comment: Links to the place(s) or organisation(s) that this organisation manages, on behalf of the owner or another organisation.

label: Manganese Per Nutrient Basis Quantity
comment: Manganese per specified nutrient basis quantity.

label: Has Manufacturer
comment: The organization that produces the item.

label: Manufacturer Preparation Code
comment: Code indicating the preparation methods that a manufacturer has used in the manufacturing of a product for example DEEP_FRY.

label: Has Manufacturer's Warranty
comment: The warranty associated with the product.

label: Has Manufacturing Plant
comment: A physical location consisting of one or more buildings with facilities for manufacturing.

label: Mass per unit area
comment: The mass per unit area of the item. This can be given using a number of different AI ranges that depend on the units in which the mass and area are measured.

label: Master data
comment: A link to a source of structured master data for the entity. This is typically for B2B applications.

label: Master Data Available For
comment: Links from a document, message or event to static data for specified identifiers.

label: Maturation Method Code
comment: The method of maturity for the item for example tree ripened or jet fresh.

label: Maximum Discount Amount
comment: Links to a gs1:PriceSpecification that indicates in terms of an amount and specified currency, the maximum discount on the sales price associated with a particular gs1:Discount. This property can be used to express 'up to $10 off'.

label: Maximum Discount Percentage
comment: A floating-point value indicating a maximum percentage discount on the sales price associated with a particular gs1:Discount. This property can be used to express 'up to 15% discount'.

label: Maximum Optimum Consumption Temperature
comment: The upper limit drinking temperature of the optimum range of the drinking temperature. The optimum range of the drinking temperature is a recommendation and is based on the experience of the individual producer. Allows for the representation of the same value in different units of measure but not multiple values.

label: Maximum Qualifying Items
comment: Specifies the maximum number of items that qualify for a particular gs1:Discount. This property can be used to express 'maximum N items per customer'.

label: Maximum Qualifying Spend
comment: Links to a gs1:PriceSpecification that indicates in terms of an amount and specified currency, the maximum spend that qualifies for a particular gs1:Discount. This property can be used to express 'for purchases of up to $100'.

label: Maximum Price
comment: Provides a maximum price value as a floating-point numeric value that is qualified by the corresponding currency. See also gs1:priceCurrency

label: Meat Poultry Type Code
comment: The fish, meat, or poultry type for this food and beverage item.

label: Menu information
comment: A link to menu details. This may include food menus, services, or other offerings provided by an organisation or at a location. For details specific to allergens only, see gs1:allergenInfo . For details specific to nutrition information only, see gs1:nutritionalInfo . For details specific to ingredients only, see gs1:ingredientsInfo .

label: Message Sender
comment: Identifies the party receiving an electronic message

label: Message Sender
comment: Identifies the party sending an electronic message

label: Minimum Discount Amount
comment: Links to a gs1:PriceSpecification that indicates in terms of an amount and specified currency, the minimum discount on the sales price associated with a particular gs1:Discount. This property can be used to express 'at least $10 off'.

label: Minimum Discount Percentage
comment: A floating-point value indicating a minimum percentage discount on the sales price associated with a particular gs1:Discount. This property can be used to express 'at least 15% discount'.

label: Minimum Fish Content
comment: The minimum amount of fish contained in a food and beverage product expressed as a measurement.

label: Minimum Meat Poultry Content
comment: The minimum amount of fish, meat or poultry contained in a food and beverage product expressed as a measurement.

label: Minimum Optimum Consumption Temperature
comment: The lower limit drinking temperature of the optimum range of the drinking temperature. The optimum range of the drinking temperature is a recommendation and is based on the experience of the individual producer. Allows for the representation of the same value in different units of measure but not multiple values.

label: Minimum Qualifying Items
comment: Specifies the minimum number of items that must be purchased to qualify for a particular gs1:Discount. This property can be used to express 'if you buy at least N items'.

label: Minimum Qualifying Spend
comment: Links to a gs1:PriceSpecification that indicates in terms of an amount and specified currency, the minimum spend required to qualify for a particular gs1:Discount. This property can be used to express 'if you spend at least $100'.

label: Minimum Price
comment: Provides a minimum price value as a floating-point numeric value that is qualified by the corresponding currency. See also gs1:priceCurrency

label: Molybdenum Per Nutrient Basis Quantity
comment: Molybdenum per specified nutrient basis quantity.

label: Monounsaturated Fat Per Nutrient Basis Quantity
comment: Monounsaturated fat per specified nutrient basis quantity.

label: Net area
comment: The net area of the item. This can be given using a number of different AI ranges that depend on the units in which the area is measured.

label: Net content
comment: The quantity of the product contained by a package, usually as claimed on the label. Indicates the net content of the total product. For fixed value products use the value claimed on the package, to avoid variable fill rate issue that arises with some product which are sold by volume or weight, and whose actual content may vary slightly from batch to batch.

label: Net weight
comment: Used to identify the net weight of the product. Net Weight excludes all packaging material, including the packaging material of all lower-level GTINs. Example:11.5 kgm.

label: Niacin Per Nutrient Basis Quantity
comment: Niacin per specified nutrient basis quantity.

label: Number of Servings Per Package
comment: The total number of servings contained in the package.

label: Number of Servings Per Package Measurement Precision
comment: Code indicating whether the number of servings per package is exact or approximate.

label: Number of Servings Range Description
comment: A free text field specifying a range for the number of servings contained in the package.

label: Nutrient Basis Quantity
comment: Quantity on which the nutrient information has been based; for example, per 100 grams. When specified, nutrientBasisQuantity establishes the basis for all contained nutrient records.

label: Nutrient Basis Quantity Type Code
comment: The type of quantity specified in the nutrientBasisQuantity for example measurement, serving size, or container. This is used in conjunction with the nutrientBasisQuantity.

label: Nutrient Measurement Precision
comment: The Code indicating whether the specified nutrient content is exact or approximate.

label: Nutritional Claim Code
comment: Code indicating a nutritional claim applicable to the product, for example FAT_FREE.

label: Nutritional Claim Statement
comment: Free text field for any additional nutritional claims.

label: Nutritional Information
comment: A link to nutritional facts.

label: Occupied by
comment: Links to the organisation(s) that occupy this place. Property SHOULD be applied to a specific sub-location, rather than a main location, wherever possible.

label: Occupies location
comment: Links to the place(s) that this organisation occupies.

label: Offer Description
comment: A description of the offer including goods or services offered for sale or use.

label: Offer Discount
comment: A discount associated with an offer.

label: Offer Redemption Type
comment: A code indicating the type of redemptions that apply to the offer, for example single use.

label: Offer Redemption URL
comment: The URL where the offer seeker will need to go in order to redeem the offer for an online redemption.

label: Offer Restriction Description
comment: A description of what the offer is restricted to, relative to all other offerings by the issuer, for example payment restrictions, subscription required, new customers only.

label: Opening hours information
comment: A link to details on hours of operation.

label: Has Organic Claim
comment: Relates to an organic claim about the product

label: Organic Claim Agency Code
comment: A governing body that creates and maintains standards related to organic products.

label: Organic Percent Claim
comment: The percent of actual organic materials per weight of the product. This is usually claimed on the product.

label: Organisation Formation Date
comment: Date in which an organisation was formed or otherwise established. Note that this is NOT the date when a GLN was allocated to identify the organisation. To designate when organisation was terminated, see gs1:organizationTerminationDate

label: Has Organization History
comment: Provides details on if and when an organisation/party is active or inactive.

label: Organisation ID
comment: Identifier value associated to an organisation/party. This value SHALL follow rules set forth by the administrating organisation designated in gs1:OrganizationID_Type.

label: Organisation ID Qualifier
comment: Secondary qualifier to supplement gs1:organizationID_Type meaning. May be used with proprietary ID code values to define identifier administrator.

label: Organisation ID
comment: Organisation that administers the gs1:organizationID or the name of the ID itself. Value from gs1:OrganizationID_Type code list.

label: Organisation ID URI
comment: A URI that links to information about the gs1:organizationID.

label: Organization Legal Name
comment: The legal name used by an organisation for official purposes. There may be more than one legal name, particularly in countries with more than one official language. In such cases the language of the string should be identified. To specify a general name, see gs1:organizationName. For trade name, see gs1:organizationTradingName. To specify the name of a function, see gs1:department.

label: Organization Name
comment: The name of the organization expressed in text.

label: Has Organization Role
comment: The role and/or purpose of a party (i.e. legal entity or function). Multiple values from gs1:OrganizationRoleType code list may be associated to a single organisation/party.

label: Organisation Status
comment: Designation of active/inactive status of an organisation/party.

label: Organisation Termination Date
comment: Date in which an organisation was disbanded or otherwise ended. Note that this is NOT the date when a GLN was deactivated. To designate when organisation formed, see gs1:organizationFormationDate.

label: Organization Trading Name
comment: A trading name or alternative forms of a legal entity's name as recognised by some jurisdictions. To specify a general name, see gs1:organizationName. For legal name, see gs1:organizationLegalName. To specify the name of a function, see gs1:department.

label: Original Code Value
comment: Links to the alphanumeric code value defined elsewhere in GS1 or the GS1 Global Data Dictionary

label: Out of Package Depth
comment: The depth of the product out of its packaging, as measured according to the GS1 Package Measurement Rules. See https://www.gs1.org/package-measurement-rules-implementation-guide for more details.

label: Out of Package Diameter
comment: The measurement of the diameter of the product out of its package at its largest point. For example, 165 MMT.

label: Out of Package Height
comment: The height of the product out of the package, as measured according to the GS1 Package Measurement Rules. See https://www.gs1.org/package-measurement-rules-implementation-guide for more details.

label: Out of Package Width
comment: The width of the product out of the package, as measured according to the GS1 Package Measurement Rules. See https://www.gs1.org/package-measurement-rules-implementation-guide for more details.

label: Owned by
comment: Links to the organisation(s) that own this place, in full or in part. This includes joint ventures. For leased locations, see gs1:lessorFor and gs1:isLeasedFrom.

label: Owns
comment: Links to the place(s) or organisation(s) that this organisation owns.

label: Has Packaging
comment: Details on the packaging for a product including type, weight and materials.

label: Packaging Date
comment: The packaging date is the date when the goods were packed as determined by the packager. The date may refer to the trade item itself or to items contained.

label: Packaging Feature
comment: Code indicating a feature that facilitates the usage of the product by the consumer, for example a handle. Packaging features do not affect the core composition of the packaging type nor modify its usage.

label: Packaging Function
comment: Code indicating specific functionality for packaging resulting from specific processes or features present in the packaging type,for example, ANTI_TAMPERING.

label: Packaging Marked Diet Allergen Type Code
comment: Indication of which dietary or allergen marks are on the package.

label: Packaging Marked Free From Code
comment: Indication of the food ingredients that the package is marked free from.

label: Accreditation Code
comment: A marking that the product received recognition, endorsement, certification by following guidelines by the label issuing agency. This does not represent claims for regulatory purposes on products such as free from markings.

label: Has Packaging Material Details
comment: links to details about packaging material type, quantity and thickness

label: Packaging Material Composition Quantity
comment: The quantity of the packaging material of the product. Can be weight, volume or surface, can vary by country.

label: Packaging Material Thickness
comment: The thickness of a packaging material.

label: Packaging Material Type
comment: The materials used for the packaging of the product for example glass or plastic.

label: Packaging Recycling Process Type
comment: The process the packaging could undertake for recyclable & sustainability programs. Examples COMPOSTABLE, ENERGY_RECOVERABLE, REUSABLE.

label: Packaging Recycling Scheme
comment: A code indicating the recycling scheme the packaging of this product will fall within when recycled. Applies to recyclable packaging with or without deposit.

label: Packaging Shape
comment: A code depicting the shape of a package for example CONE.

label: Packaging Type
comment: The dominant means used to transport, store, handle or display the product as defined by the data source. This packaging is not used to describe any manufacturing process.Recommend to use UNECE Rec 21 codes.

label: Pantothenic Acid Per Nutrient Basis Quantity
comment: Pantothenic Acid per specified nutrient basis quantity.

label: Parent Organization
comment: Designates the legal entity or function directly above the organisation/party being identified in a hierarchy. This is not defaulted to the highest-level entity in the hierarchy. Only one parent organisation SHALL be associated to a single GLN. To specify other affiliated organisations, see gs1:affiliatedTo, gs1:managedBy, gs1:franchiseeOf, gs1:ownedBy. To specify an organisation/party lower in the hierarchy, see gs1:subOrganization.

label: Party GLN
comment: 13-digit GLN that is being used to identify a legal entity or function. If gs1:glnType is present, gs1:partyGLN SHALL only be used when gs1:GLN_TypeCode includes LEGAL_ENTITY and/or FUNCTION

label: Make Payment
comment: A link to a place where payments details are provided and/or payments can be made by the user.

label: Payment Terms
comment: The type of payment term expressed as a code, for example Discount.

label: Percentage of Alcohol Per Volume
comment: The percentage of alcohol contained in product.

label: Phosphorus Per Nutrient Basis Quantity
comment: Phosphorus per specified nutrient basis quantity.

label: Physical Location Name
comment: The name of a physical place. To specify the name of a digital location, see gs1:digitalLocationName.

label: Product Information Page
comment: A link to information specifically about the identified item, typically operated by the brand owner or a retailer of the product and aimed at consumers. It may include links to further information, product description, specifications etc.

label: Polygon
comment: A polygon is the area enclosed by a point-to-point path for which the starting and ending points are the same. A polygon is expressed as a series of four or more space delimited points where the first and final points are identical.

label: Polyols Per Nutrient Basis Quantity
comment: Polyols per specified nutrient basis quantity.

label: Polyunsaturated Fat Per Nutrient Basis Quantity
comment: Polyunsaturated fat per specified nutrient basis quantity.

label: Postal Code
comment: Text specifying the postal code for an address.

label: Postal Name
comment: The name of the recipient expressed in text. Note that this may be different than gs1:OrganizationName.

label: PO Box Number
comment: The number that identifies a PO box. A PO box is a box in a post office or other postal service location assigned to an organization where postal items may be kept.

label: Potassium Per Nutrient Basis Quantity
comment: Potassium per specified nutrient basis quantity.

label: Preparation Type Code
comment: Code specifying the preparation state of the product for which the nutrient information is valid. PREPARED, UNPREPARED.

label: Preparation Consumption Precautions
comment: Specifies additional precautions to be taken before preparation or consumption of the product.

label: Has Food And Beverage Preparation Information
comment: Links to information about how to prepare a specific Food/Beverage/Tobacco product.

label: Preparation Instructions
comment: Free text providing instructions on how to prepare the product before serving.

label: Preservation Technique
comment: Code indicating the preservation technique used to preserve the product from deterioration, for example, BRINING.

label: Price Value
comment: Provides a price value as a floating-point numeric value that is qualified by the corresponding currency. See also gs1:priceCurrency. The price value indicates the unit price unless the property gs1:eligibleQuantity is specified and indicates multiple units

label: Price Currency
comment: A string value indicating a currency from ISO 4217 for example USD .

label: Price Specification
comment: The price related to an offer. If the offer is a multi-buy offer for a quantity of product greater than one unit, this should be indicated using the property gs1:eligibleQuantity

label: Has Primary Alternate Product
comment: A product that is similar to the current product but is not exact match. Same form fit function, e.g. same product different colour, different package size, better quality.

label: Primary location of
comment: Links to the organisation(s) that designate this place as its/their primary location. Property SHOULD be applied to a specific sub-location, rather than a main location, wherever possible.

label: Product Description
comment: An understandable and useable description of a product using brand and other descriptors. This attribute is filled with as little abbreviation as possible, while keeping to a reasonable length. This should be a meaningful description of the product with full spelling to facilitate message processing. Retailers can use this description as the base to fully understand the brand, flavour, scent etc. of the specific product, in order to accurately create a product description as needed for their internal systems. Examples: XYZ Brand Base Invisible Solid Deodorant AP Stick Spring Breeze.

label: Product Feature Benefit
comment: Element for consumer facing marketing content to describe the key features or benefits of the style suitable for display purposes.

label: Product Form Description
comment: The physical form or shape of the product. Used, for example, in pharmaceutical industry to indicate the formulation of the product. Defines the form the product takes and is distinct from the form of the packaging.

label: Product ID
comment: Additional means to the Global Trade Item Number to identify a product.

label: Production Date
comment: The production date is the production or assembly date determined by the manufacturer. The date may refer to the trade item itself or to items contained.

label: Production Date and Time
comment: The date and time of production (or assembly). The date and time of production is determined by the manufacturer. The date and time may refer to the trade item itself or to the items contained.

label: Production Variant Description
comment: Free text assigned by the manufacturer to describe the production variant. Examples are: package series X, package series Y.

label: Production Variant Effective Date Time
comment: The start date of a production variant. The variant applies to products having a date mark (a best before date or expiration date) on the package that comes on or after the effective date.

label: Product Marketing Message
comment: Marketing message associated with the product. Consumer-friendly marketing detailed description of the product.

label: Product Name
comment: Consumer friendly short description of the product suitable for compact presentation.

label: Product Range
comment: A name, used by a Brand Owner, that span multiple consumer categories or uses. E.g. (Waist Watchers).

label: Sustainability and recycling (deprecated)
comment: This term has been deprecated. Please use gs1:sustainabilityInfo instead.

label: Product Yield
comment: Product quantity after preparation. This can differ based on productYieldType

label: Product Yield Type Code
comment: Code indicating the type of yield measurement specified in productYield. Examples: AFTER_DILUTION, DRAINED_WEIGHT.

label: Product Yield Variation Percentage
comment: Indication of range in percent of the given cooking / roasting loss. Percentage that the actual weight of the product differs upward or downward from the average or estimated product yield.

label: Promotion
comment: A link to a promotion.

label: Protein Per Nutrient Basis Quantity
comment: Protein per specified nutrient basis quantity.

label: Provenance Statement
comment: Free text description of the region or place the product originates from. This is to be specifically used to specify areas such as cities, mountain ranges, regions. Examples: Made in the Thuringen Mountains, Made in Paris, From the Napa Valley.

label: Purchase supplies or accessories
comment: A link to information about where supplies or accessories for the item can be purchased or ordered.

label: Qualifying Brand Name
comment: If specified, the discount is only available when purchasing a product from one of the brand names specified via this property.

label: Qualifying Product GPC codes
comment: If specified, the discount is only available when purchasing a product whose Global Product Classification (GPC) brick value appears in the list specified via this property.

label: Qualifying Product Category Description
comment: If specified, the discount is only available when purchasing a product from categories specified in this free-form text field.

label: Qualifying Product Classification Code
comment: If specified, the discount is only available when purchasing a product whose product classification (other than GPC) appears in the list specified via this property. This property specifies a product classification other than GPC.

label: Qualifying Product GTINs
comment: If specified, the discount is only available when purchasing a product whose GTIN appears in the list specified via this property.

label: Qualifying Sub-brand Name
comment: If specified, the discount is only available when purchasing a product from one of the sub-brand names (specified product ranges for a given brand) specified via this property.

label: Quick start guide
comment: A link to a description of the key features needed to be understood to begin using the item or interacting with something new.

label: Recall status
comment: A link to information about whether the product has been recalled or not, typically an API.

label: Recipe website
comment: A link to a recipe website.

label: Has Referenced File
comment: Link to a file or website containing additional information on product.

label: Referenced File Effective End Date
comment: The date upon which the target of this external link ceases to be effective for use.

label: Referenced File Effective Start Date
comment: The date upon which the target of this external link begins to be effective for use.

label: Referenced File Size
comment: The size of the file as it is stored in an uncompressed format.

label: Referenced File Type
comment: A code indicating the purpose or role of file (not a MIME type) that is being referenced, for example PRODUCT_LABEL_IMAGE. This code is used when the purpose of a file is not specified in the property.

label: Website
comment: Simple text string that refers to a resource on the internet, URLs may refer to documents, resources, people, etc.

label: Register purchase
comment: A link to an entry point for registering ownership of a product including for warranty purposes.

label: Entry in a register
comment: A link to an entry in a register, such as a business register or register of locations. Such registers may act as alternative identifiers, such as official company numbers, LEIs, other location identifiers etc.

label: Regulated Product Name
comment: The prescribed, regulated or generic product name or denomination that describes the true nature of the product. For example for a food product in order to distinguish it from other foods according to country specific regulations.

label: Regulation Type
comment: Links to a code indicating the type of government regulation.

label: Regulatory Act
comment: The name given to the requirement assigned by the regulatory agency.

label: Regulatory Identifier
comment: Links to one or more groupings of identifiers that reference documents or datasets within a regulatory information system, repository or registry.

label: Regulatory Identifier Type
comment: The code indicating the type of regulatory information that is referenced.

label: Regulatory Information
comment: Links to one or more groupings of information on applicable government regulations applicable to a trade item.

label: Regulatory Information Provider
comment: The organisation that provided a document or dataset to a regulatory information system, repository or registry.

label: Regulatory Reference Applicability End Date
comment: The final date for which the referenced information remains applicable.

label: Regulatory Reference Applicability Start Date
comment: The earliest date from which the referenced information becomes applicable.

label: Regulatory Reference Number
comment: A reference number for a record, document or dataset stored within a regulatory information system, repository or registry.

label: Regulatory Verification Number
comment: A verification number for a record, document or dataset stored within a regulatory information system, repository or registry, typically used in combination with the reference number when requesting access to the refrenced document or dataset.

label: Reheating Claim
comment: Indicates, with reference to the product branding, labelling or packaging whether a food product which is ready to eat can be reheated if required prior to consumption.

label: Related image
comment: A link to any image that depicts or relates to the identified entity (e.g., trade item, assets, business process, patient record, location, organisation, etc.)

label: Has Organisation
comment: The organisation(s) associated with a place.

label: Related video
comment: A link to any video, or document that has an embedded video, that describes or relates to the identified item, organisation, or location in some way.

label: Replaced by organization
comment: Links to the successor organisation that is used in place of a previous organisation

label: Replaced by Place
comment: Links to the successor location that is used in place of a previous location

label: Has Replaced By Product
comment: The product which permanently replaces the current product. This product is sent in the record for the original item that is being replaced.

label: Replaced organization
comment: Links to the previous organisation that this organisation replaces

label: Replaced Place
comment: Links to the previous location that this location replaces

label: Has Replaced Product
comment: Indicates the product identification of an item that is being permanently replaced by this product.

label: Report found
comment: A link to a platform or service where users (company or a person) can report a found item associated with the identified entity (instance of an item). This link type is designed to assist in connecting the found item with its rightful owner or relevant authorities.

label: Responsibility
comment: Text further specifying the area of responsibility of the trade contact.

label: Responsible for location
comment: Links to the place(s) for which this organisation is responsible.

label: Organisation responsible for the location
comment: Links to the organisation that is directly responsible for this place.

label: Returnable Package Deposit Amount
comment: The monetary amount for the individual returnable package.

label: Returnable Package Deposit Region
comment: The geographic region associated with the returnable package deposit amount.

label: Reviews
comment: A link to reviews.

label: Riboflavin Per Nutrient Basis Quantity
comment: Riboflavin per specified nutrient basis quantity.

label: Safety information
comment: A link to safety information.

label: Salt Per Nutrient Basis Quantity
comment: Salt per specified nutrient basis quantity.

label: Saturated Fat Per Nutrient Basis Quantity
comment: Saturated fat per specified nutrient basis quantity.

label: Scheduling/Reservation
comment: A link to a site that offers information on scheduling, appointments, or reservations. This may or may not allow the user to book the reservation.

label: Season Calendar Year
comment: The calendar year in which the product is seasonally available.

label: Season Name
comment: Element defines the season applicable to the item for example Winter.

label: Season Parameter
comment: Code indicating the season in which the product is available, e.g. SPRING, WINTER

label: Seeker
comment: The organization seeking an offer.

label: Selected Products Only
comment: If specified and set to true, the discount only applies to specific products selected by the retailer or offer promoter - not to all items in that product category. This property should be asserted and set to true for offers that say 'on selected products'.

label: Selenium Per Nutrient Basis Quantity
comment: Selenium per specified nutrient basis quantity.

label: Sell By Date
comment: The date specified by the manufacturer as the last date the retailer is to offer the product for sale to the consumer. The product should not be merchandised after this date.

label: Seller
comment: The organization seeking to sell a product or service.

label: Service information
comment: A link to service or maintenance instructions.

label: Serving Size
comment: Measurement value specifying the serving size in which the information per nutrient has been stated. Example: Per 100 GRM.

label: Serving Size Description
